user.title: Set up Schellenberg USB Stick
user.description: Enter the serial port path for your Schellenberg USB stick.

usb_confirm.title: Confirm Schellenberg USB Stick
usb_confirm.description: Confirm the serial port path for your discovered Schellenberg USB stick.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the serial port
error.pairing_timeout: No device responded within 2 minutes. Please try again and ensure you press the pairing button on your blind motor.

abort.no_hub: No USB hub found. Please set up the USB hub first.

pair_device.title: Pair and calibrate
pair_device.description: After pressing Pair, use an already paired physical remote within 2 minutes: select the motor/channel, press its programming button until the channel LED blinks, then press Stop and wait for the motor to beep or rattle. Home Assistant will detect the frame and send teach command 60 followed by finish command 40 on the same enum. A USB stick ACK does not prove the motor learned the transmitter.

pair_test.title: Pair and test
pair_test.description: After pressing Pair, use an already paired physical remote within 2 minutes: select the motor/channel, press its programming button until the channel LED blinks, then press Stop and wait for the motor to beep or rattle. Home Assistant will detect the frame and send teach command 60 followed by finish command 40 on the same enum. A USB stick ACK does not prove the motor learned the transmitter. A short Open/Stop test follows; confirm whether the motor actually moved.

manual.title: Configure blind identities
manual.description: The command identity is used for outgoing control. The optional status identity is matched against received movement messages; leave it blank to use the command identity.

name_device.title: Name your device
name_device.description: A pairing candidate was detected and the USB stick teach command was transmitted for device ID {device_id}. The stick ACK cannot prove that the motor authorized it. Name the blind, then verify actual movement.

test_motor.title: Test motor command
test_motor.description: This sends a short Open command and then Stop to command identity {device_id}/{device_enum}. Watch the motor and press Test.

manual_times.title: Enter travel times
manual_times.description: Enter the measured full opening and closing times.

developer_tools.title: Developer tools

copy_diagnostics.title: Copy diagnostics
copy_diagnostics.description: Select and copy the diagnostic text below. Press Submit to return.

edit.title: Edit blind settings
edit.description: Changing protocol identities does not change the Home Assistant entity unique ID.

calibration_close.title: Step 1: Close the blind
calibration_close.description: First, ensure {device_name} is fully closed (all the way down). Press 'Next' when ready.

calibration_open_instruction.title: Step 2: Open the blind
calibration_open_instruction.description: Now we will measure how long it takes to open {device_name}. Press Start **then** press the open button on the control to start measuring.

calibration_close_instruction.title: Step 3: Close the blind
calibration_close_instruction.description: Now we will measure how long it takes to close {device_name}. Press Start **then** press the close button on the control to start measuring.

calibration_complete.title: Calibration complete
calibration_complete.description:
Calibration for {device_name} complete!

Measured times:
- Open time: {open_time} seconds
- Close time: {close_time} seconds

teach_motor.title: Teach motor / activate USB transmitter

send_raw_command.title: Send raw RF payload

error.invalid_device_id: Device ID must contain exactly 6 hexadecimal characters.
error.invalid_device_enum: Enum must contain exactly 2 hexadecimal characters.
error.invalid_travel_time: Travel time must be greater than zero.
error.already_configured: This command device ID is already configured.
error.command_failed: The serial command could not be queued. Check the USB connection and logs.
error.pairing_timeout: No device responded within 2 minutes. Please try again.
error.calibration_timeout: Calibration timed out. Please check the device and try again.
error.calibration_start_timeout: Timeout waiting for the blind to start moving.
error.invalid_raw_payload: Enter exactly 11 characters: 'ss' followed by 9 hexadecimal characters.
error.transmit_failed: The raw payload could not be transmitted. Check the stick state and logs.

abort.pairing_timeout: No device responded within 2 minutes. Please try again.

init.title: Schellenberg USB
init.description: Edit the serial port path for the Schellenberg USB hub.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the serial port

pair.name: Pair device
pair.description: Activate pairing mode on the Schellenberg USB stick to pair a new blind motor. After calling this service, press the pairing button on your blind motor within 10 seconds.

test_command.name: Test blind command
test_command.description: Send open, close, or stop to a device enum without creating a cover.
